TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Chauncey_Billups, title = Chauncey_Billups, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chauncey_Billups} }

S.FORM: == Chauncey Billups == kawas te 1976, byacing te 9 ru 25 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Colorado, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 191 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 95 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1997 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Boston Celtics. qyanux na sraral Billups htagan beh sa Denver, Colorado. 1995 kawas tmasot pqwasan biru beh George Washington High School. 1995 kawas hopa pqwasan biru hiya ga magal blaq balay mari p'unro. Piper neril nya maki cyugal kneril laqi Cydney,Ciara ru Cenaiya lalu nya. hiya ga sswe mlikuy Rodney lalu nya. 2002-2005 kawas maki beh University of Denver rasaw mari gluw.raran ga Rodney sakang' NBA.musa Europe mspung.tmasot lga tmwang mincyogun na qyanux. Billups maki gocyu ru hopa pqwasan biru ru mincyogun na qyanux te payat na mspung. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

== Chauncey Billups == kawas te 1976, byacing te 9 ru 25 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Colorado, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 191 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 95 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1997 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Boston Celtics. qyanux na sraral Billups htagan beh sa Denver, Colorado. 1995 kawas tmasot pqwasan biru beh George Washington High School. 1995 kawas hopa pqwasan biru hiya ga magal blaq balay mari p'unro. Piper neril nya maki cyugal kneril laqi Cydney,Ciara ru Cenaiya lalu nya. hiya ga sswe mlikuy Rodney lalu nya. 2002-2005 kawas maki beh University of Denver rasaw mari gluw.raran ga Rodney sakang' NBA.musa Europe mspung.tmasot lga tmwang mincyogun na qyanux. Billups maki gocyu ru hopa pqwasan biru ru mincyogun na qyanux te payat na mspung. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == ¶~ ®ńßaun ¶~ ®ej ő≤illups~…ē == kawas~…ē te ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te * ru ** rjax qu ńßint…£an nja, kinńßulan nja …£a ¶~ ®olora*o, ńßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ēquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq nja, ** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja, ńßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari nő≤a. kawas~…ē **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari …£a, mzjup s~…ēqu te qutux lańßuj ru te ma…£al s~…ēquliq, …£alun nqu ő≤os~…ēton ¶~ ®elti ¶~ ®s~…ē. qjanux na s~…ēraral ő≤illups~…ē ńßta…£an ő≤eńß s~…ēa *en*er, ¶~ ®olora*o. **** kawas~…ē tmas~…ēot pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru ő≤eńß …£eor…£e was~…ēńßiŇčton ńßi…£ńß s~…ē ¶~ ®ńßool. **** kawas~…ē ńßopa pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru ńßija …£a ma…£al ő≤laq ő≤alaj mari p Ēunro. piper neril nja maki ¶~ ®ju…£al kneril laqi ¶~ ®j*nej, ¶~ ®iara ru ¶~ ®enaija lalu nja. ńßija …£a s~…ēs~…ēwe mlikuj ro*nej lalu nja. ****-**** kawas~…ē maki ő≤eńß uni*ers~…ēitj o* *en*er ras~…ēaw mari …£luw.raran …£a ro*nej s~…ēakaŇč Ē nő≤a.mus~…ēa europe ms~…ēpuŇč.tmas~…ēot l…£a tmwaŇč min ¶~ ®jo…£un na qjanux. ő≤illups~…ē maki …£o ¶~ ®ju ru ńßopa pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru ru min ¶~ ®jo…£un na qjanux te pajat na ms~…ēpuŇč. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč mas~…ēuq ms~…ēpuŇč mari s~…ēa ps~…ēpŇčan mari na maj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
